name: IMMEDIA GROUP PLC LS -,10
summary: Immedia Group PLC is a UK-based provider of digital content and marketing solutions, specializing in creating and distributing audio and video content for various platforms. The company offers services such as content creation, audio branding, and in-store radio solutions to businesses in the retail, leisure, and hospitality sectors. Headquartered in the UK, Immedia Group aims to enhance customer engagement and brand awareness through its content delivery services.
